title: Joining a Club 参加社团
scene: 开学社团招新，学生去报名参加社团。

lines.en: Excuse me, is this the art club?
lines.zh: 打扰一下，这是美术社团吗？

lines.en: Yes, it is! Are you interested in joining?
Yes, I love drawing and painting. Can I join?
lines.zh: 是的，我喜欢画画。我可以加入吗？

lines.en: Of course! We meet every Tuesday and Thursday after school.
lines.zh: 当然可以！我们每周二和周四放学后活动。

lines.en: That's perfect. What do we do in the club?
lines.zh: 太好了。我们在社团里做什么？

lines.en: We learn to draw, paint, and make crafts. Sometimes we have art shows.
lines.zh: 我们学画画、做手工。有时候我们还有画展。

lines.en: That sounds so fun! Do I need to bring anything?
lines.zh: 听起来太有趣了！我需要带什么吗？

lines.en: Just bring your enthusiasm! We provide all the materials.
lines.zh: 只要带你的热情来就行！我们提供所有材料。

lines.en: Great! How much is the membership fee?
It's free for all students. Welcome to the art club, Sophie!
lines.zh: 对所有学生免费。欢迎来到美术社团，苏菲！
